allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import rdkit, fastapi, uvicorn, requests; print\(rdkit.__version__, fastapi.__version__\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('formula:', d['formula']\); print\('MW:', d['mol_weight']\); print\('rings:', d['num_rings']\); print\('mol_block lines:', d['mol_block'].count\(chr\(10\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('formula:', d['formula']\); print\('SMILES:', d['smiles']\)")
